summary: Add an INTERNAL-only API to edit an existing booking; client apps must not be able to call it.

onSuccess: release currently reserved roster slots for the booking
reserve the target duo for the edited booking window
update booking_companion_assignments to match the target duo

matchStatusPolicy.rule: Internal edits are allowed only while both assignment rows are still at default statuses (presence=ASSIGNED, selfMatch=NOT_MATCHED, clientMatch=WAITING_FOR_CLIENT). If any of these have progressed, reject with INVALID_STATE_TRANSITION. This constraint applies to all PATCH edits (time/venue edits and reassignment).
